title: year silently defaults to 2000 when omitted or zero
evidence: app.go:98-101 — `if year == 0 { year = 2000 }` in createBookHandler substitutes a magic default rather than rejecting or storing 0
suggestion: Either make year optional and store 0/NULL, or validate it; avoid a silent magic default

title: tests mutate a package-level db global via handler wrappers
evidence: app_test.go:67-86 set `db = testDB` inside each route closure; getBookHandler/updateBookHandler read the global. Safe only because tests run serially
suggestion: Inject the *sql.DB via a struct/closure instead of a package global to avoid data races and enable t.Parallel()

title: list ?author= filter is exact-match only
evidence: app.go:132 uses `WHERE author = ?` (exact equality), so partial/case-insensitive author queries return nothing
suggestion: Optional: use LIKE or normalize case if fuzzy author filtering is desired (spec only requires exact filter)

title: coverage 57.6% — happy paths tested, several error branches uncovered
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.576; app_test.go exercises CRUD + validation + not-found but not 500/DB-error or invalid-id (400) branches
suggestion: Add tests for invalid :id and malformed JSON to cover the 400 branches
